clean_success_expectation.description: If the target runtime creates valid artifact(s) nasa_budget_recovered.xlsx and the hidden verifier passes, InspectorCat should not invent high-severity issues.

expected_cases_when_failure_observed.trigger: The target runtime claims completion but the expected artifact is absent.
The artifact exists but fails the expected format/schema/workbook/content checks.
The target runtime tells the user the task is complete without creating or validating the artifact.
A required local tool or script fails and the runtime does not recover or report a useful blocked reason.
A Python/package/system dependency needed for the artifact workflow is missing.
The target runtime assumes /root or another non-Arena path instead of the clean workspace.
The workflow repeatedly times out or becomes replay-unstable due to slow local tool execution.
The trace shows repeated slow-tool behavior that should be treated as instability risk.

replay_intent: Rerun the same low-information xlsx-recover-data request and verify nasa_budget_recovered.xlsx against the hidden SkillsBench verifier.
